shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

mkdir -p vectorops/src/vectorops simple/vectorops && cat > vectorops/src/vectorops/__init__.py <<'PY'
from typing import Sequence


def dotproduct(a: Sequence[int | float], b: Sequence[int | float]) -> int | float:
    if len(a) != len(b):
        raise ValueError("Vectors must have the same length")
    return sum(x * y for x, y in zip(a, b))
PY
cat > vectorops/pyproject.toml <<'TOML'
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "vectorops"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Simple vector operations"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.8"
authors = [
  {name = "Bub"}
]

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "src"}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
TOML
cat > vectorops/README.md <<'MD'
# vectorops

Simple vector operations package containing `dotproduct`.
MD
